title: ElectricTechnoCraft
description: A technical modpack that will help you understand engineering.
body:
Is a modpack assembled for those who love technology.

Feel like a real mechanic in this modpack. With ElectricTechnoCraft you can create any mechanism you want. Start with a cobblestone farm and finish it with its own subway.

Get involved in automating everything that comes to your mind including simplifying survival. A lot of interesting content have been added here to create various devices, making the game even more exciting. And in more ways than one, it's makes it easier and you definitely won't get bored! After all, you can discover new views and modes.

You can create energy sources from which all technologies can be powered. Thus, you can create a mill, a cultural farm, a slaughterhouse, farms for the production of various necessary materials and much more.

You no longer have to waste time and do everything yourself, everything can be done much easier!

If you have any questions or want to help, then join the discord.!
